# applicationset-flags

ApplicationSet progressive syncs, policy override, reconciliations limit, requeue

!!! tip "Direction: `from`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `from` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/cmd-params/applicationset-flags` |

## Input

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
data:
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.progressive.syncs: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.policy.override: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.scm.providers: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.concurrent.reconciliations.max: "10"
  applicationsetcontroller.requeue.after: 3m
  applicationsetcontroller.webhook.parallelism.limit: "5"
  applicationsetcontroller.policy: sync
  applicationsetcontroller.namespaces: team-*,sandbox
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  applicationSet:
    namespaceGlobs:
    - team-*
    - sandbox
    policy: sync
    policyOverrideEnabled: true
    progressiveSyncs:
      enabled: true
    reconciliationsParallelismLimit: 10
    requeueAfter: 3m0s
    scmProvidersEnabled: true
    webhookParallelismLimit: 5
  commitServer: {}
  controller: {}
  repoServer: {}
  server: {}
```
